title: polybotrya polyphylla
intro: Polybotrya polyphylla, also known as the many-leaved polypody, is a species of fern native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Polybotrya polyphylla include reducing inflammation, improving lung function, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
